CREATE PROCEDURE test_read_log (IN f ANY, IN inpos INT := 0) { DECLARE pos INT; result_names(op, g, s, p, o); DECLARE h = file_open(f, inpos); DECLARE rr ANY; WHILE ((rr := read_log(h, pos)) IS NOT NULL) { DECLARE rw ANY; FOR i := 1 TO length(rr) DO { r := rr[i]; IF (r[0] = 13) { rw := r[2]; op := 'I'; } ELSE IF (r[0] IN (1,8,9)) { rw := r[1]; op := 'I'; } ELSE IF (r[0] IN (3,14)) { rw := r[1]; op := 'D'; } IF (rw IS NOT NULL) { k := rw[0]; IF (k = 273) { result(op, __ro2sq(rw[1]), __ro2sq(rw[2]), __ro2sq(rw[3]), __ro2sq(rw[4])); } } } } result(pos + inpos, '', '', '', ''); };
